texto: There is no such thing as a miracle. That is, there is never an absolute reversal of any natural law. Every event, however unexpected by us, who are all more or less grossly ignorant of Nature and of Nature's laws, is the result of pre-existing causes, which develop results in ways and to extents strictly conformable to the energies set in motion. Supernormal events maybe, but nothing is supernatural.
explicacao: Orientação direta de William Wynn Westcott sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “There is no such thing as a miracle. That is, there is never an absolute reversal of any natural …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, life-lessons, miracles, útil em momentos de miracles e philosophy.
